hero.title: Reliable legal support for individuals and businesses
hero.subtitle: Expert advice and representation in property and contract law and other key legal areas.
hero.micro: Confidential • No obligation on first contact

banner.discription: We place special emphasis on legal support for entrepreneurs, companies and crafts in everyday business operations and dispute resolution.

aboutMe.title: Professional and trustworthy
aboutMe.lead: The office has been operating independently since January 2023, following several years of experience at the Law Office of Damir Batarelo in Split (2018-2022).
aboutMe.bullet1: Graduated from the Faculty of Law in Split 2016
aboutMe.bullet3: My work is based on responsibility, confidentiality, and clear communication
aboutMe.focus: Focus: property and land registry law, contract law, drafting/analysis of contracts, and representation in court and out-of-court proceedings.

services.title: Practice areas
services.desc: I provide legal services to individuals and legal entities in the following areas:

property.title: Property & land registry law
property.desc: Ownership, co-ownership, registrations and land registry regulation.

contract.title: Contract law
contract.desc: Drafting and analysis of contracts and contractual disputes.

inheritance.title: Inheritance law
inheritance.desc: Counseling and representation in probate proceedings.

admin.title: Administrative law
admin.desc: Representation in proceedings before competent authorities.

enforcement.title: Enforcement law
enforcement.desc: Preparation and management of enforcement and debt collection.

labor.title: Labor law
labor.desc: Counseling and representation of employers and employees.

contactUs.name: Name and surname
contactUs.description: Send a short description of your inquiry and you will receive a response as soon as possible. We respond to inquiries within two business days. Prior arrangement is required for receiving clients.

footer.byAppt: Prior arrangement is required for client reception.
